title: Dezeen Agenda features Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library by Snøhetta
summary:
The latest edition of our weekly Dezeen Agenda newsletter features the Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library in North Dakota. Located outside Medora, North Dakota, the 95,000-square-foot library blends into its surroundings with a hill-like green roof and mass timber and earthen walls. This week's newsletter also included the news that an office-to-residential development in New York
